nodes.summary: Marketing/product photograph of the KalkMate device — a hand holding an Esperanza-branded 12-digit electronic calculator whose OLED display shows the 'KalkMate' wordmark, against an electronics workbench background featuring an oscilloscope displaying a sine wave, a soldering iron station, a multimeter, a spool of solder, breadboards, prototype PCBs, and component bins under a desk lamp. Conveys the product's identity as a DIY/hardware-hacked educational calculator and is used as a hero/showcase image on the KalkMate website.

edges.reason: Both are KalkMate product photographs in the website's public asset directory, likely part of the same marketing image series showing the calculator hardware.
